title: valerianella eriocarpa subsp. truncata
intro: Valerianella eriocarpa subsp. truncata is a subspecies of the Valerianella eriocarpa plant, a type of corn spurry that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Valerianella eriocarpa subsp. truncata include its potential to help alleviate urinary tract issues and to reduce inflammation, making it a useful herb in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or used in infusions, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy for various health concerns.
